paths.title: Complete Course
paths.description: All 27 lessons in recommended pedagogical order — setup through safe concurrency.

paths.title: Ownership Mastery Track
paths.description: Deep focus on ownership, borrowing, and lifetimes — the hardest part of Rust.

paths.title: Systems Programming Track
paths.description: Ownership + types + error handling + concurrency — skip functional patterns.

paths.title: Fast Track — Core Concepts
paths.description: One lesson per module covering the most important concept. Covers all nine modules.
